title: ResultPublication
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 15.6, plus the ADR-010/canon-0.2.0 challenge_deadline_at addition. Owned by tally-service (epd2_tally_service.domain.ResultPublication). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control (ADR-009 item 15): account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on an instance that validates against this schema - only aggregate counts and administrative fields are ever carried here, never individual vote contents. No status/finality field exists here or anywhere in this service: per ADR-010, expiry of challenge_deadline_at is necessary but never by itself sufficient for finality, and no code path in tally-service ever declares a ResultPublication 'final'.
